prompt: A set of 12 Corgi dog emojis, arranged in a 3×4 grid, in a cartoon hand-drawn style with clean lines, soft colors, and a pure white background. The Corgi is orange and white, with a round head, large eyes, and rosy cheeks; the expressions are soft, cute, and healing. Each image corresponds to a different daily emotion: angry, happy, working, slacking off, time to eat, sleeping, off work, received, thanks for the red envelope, looking up at the boss, envious, dazed. There is a handwritten-style Chinese text label above each image. The overall style is unified, with flat colors and light soft shadows, no extra background elements, suitable for chat stickers.
